channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What does Pakistan stand to gain from helping broker the US-Iran deal?
item.description: Pakistan sees strategic opportunity in the US-Iran thaw, including trade, energy access and renewed regional relevance.

item.title: Iranians cautiously optimistic about thorny deal with US
item.description: Iran is watching closely as months of complex negotiations lie ahead amid internal political disputes.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Full group schedule and top third-round matches to watch
item.description: Remaining group schedule, teams, as well as the best third-round group fixtures at the tournament in North America.

item.title: Japan weighs deploying forces to demine the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Japan is considering sending its navy to help clear mines in the Strait of Hormuz following the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Messi, Mbappe, Haaland contest best ever Golden Boot race?
item.description: Lionel Messi leads the way with five goals with Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland second with four goals each.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates defeat pro-Israel lawmakers in primaries
item.description: Candidates backed by Zohran Mamdani have scored major wins in primaries, unseating Democrats backed by pro-Israel groups

item.title: US Senate approves Iran war powers resolution: What that means for Trump
item.description: Four Republicans cross party lines to vote in favour of the measure.

item.title: North Korea commissions warship as Kim eyes nuclear navy
item.description: Kim Jong Un vows to equip North Korea's navy with nuclear weapons, signaling a strategic shift in military capabilities.

item.title: Brazil vs Scotland World Cup 2026: Preview, prediction, team news, lineups
item.description: Neymar could make his first appearance at this World Cup as Scotland aim to escape the group stage for the first time.

item.title: Kenya braces for return of Gen Z protests – how did they begin?
item.description: Two years since Gen Z protests rocked President Ruto's government, thousands gear up to take to the streets again.

item.title: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor returning from DR Congo
item.description: The patient is in isolation, following strict biosafety protocols to prevent risk of spread in France.

item.title: How to stay cool and treat heatstroke during a heatwave
item.description: Heatstroke is a severe medical condition that occurs when a human body’s internal temperature exceeds 40C (104F).

item.title: Ukraine attacks on Russian-occupied Crimea trigger power cuts in Sevastopol
item.description: The largest city on the Russia-controlled peninsula has been left without power after an attack on energy facilities.

item.title: Four Gaza aid flotilla activists released from Libya detention
item.description: Global Sumud Flotilla group says six others remain in detention and are expected to be released within 24 hours.

item.title: Israeli soldiers ‘celebrate’ inside displaced Lebanese family’s home
item.description: Israeli soldiers ‘celebrate’ inside displaced Lebanese family's home

item.title: World Cup 2026: Key takeaways from the second round of group stage matches
item.description: Here's a look at the viral moments, on-field controversies, the biggest players, best performances, goals and more.

item.title: South Africa’s crises will not be solved by blaming migrants
item.description: The solution is real socio-economic change in the country, and the labour movement is best positioned to push for it.

item.title: North Korea commissions largest-ever warship
item.description: North Korea commissions largest-ever warship

item.title: Ukraine strikes strategic Russian bridge in Crimea
item.description: Ukraine strikes strategic Russian bridge in Crimea

item.title: Ukraine’s recovery to be deliberated in Poland amid Kyiv-Warsaw spat
item.description: Amid a brewing row that tests Poland's alliance with Ukraine, President Zelenskyy will skip a key conference.

item.title: Mamdani-backed candidates sweep New York City Democratic primaries
item.description: Democratic socialist candidates backed by New York City mayor win key primaries, ousting two sitting congressmen.

item.title: Power outages in France as Europe bakes in record heat
item.description: Italy declares red heatwave alert in 16 cities, including Rome, as UK prepares for highest ever June temperatures.

item.title: Iran war day 117: Nuclear inspections dispute as US Senate curbs war powers
item.description: Iran and the US clash over nuclear inspections and Hormuz as negotiators push for a final deal within 60 days.

item.title: Diabetes patients in Gaza face survival battle amid war shortages
item.description: Insulin and equipment shortages in Gaza pose fatal risks, leading to critical health complications.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 13: Portugal’s Ronaldo breaks record while England draw
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.
